title: Credit Card Payoff With $25 Extra Payment — TheDailyo
h1: Credit Card Payoff With $25 Extra Payment
subtitle: See how adding $25/month changes payoff time and interest.
description: Calculate how an extra $25 monthly payment affects your credit card payoff timeline, interest paid, and total cost.
howItWorksHtml: This page pre-fills an extra $25/month. Extra payments reduce principal after interest, which can shorten payoff time and reduce total interest paid.

faq.a: Yes—small extra payments reduce principal faster, which reduces interest over time. The savings compound month after month.

faq.q: Where should the extra payment go?
faq.a: In this model, your total payment is applied monthly: interest first, then the remainder reduces principal.
Cards may use daily compounding and fees. This is a simplified monthly estimate to help you plan.

related.title: Credit Card Payoff Calculator
related.desc: Standard payoff estimate with no extra.

related.title: Extra $50 Payment
related.desc: Compare payoff speed with $50 extra per month.

affiliate.headline: Lower your APR and pay off faster
